by: Taka 2026-07-24 (recorded by CC-alpha; relay to CLAUDE_WEB for JSON master update)
reason: question_ledger.conservation_law の記載欠陥(未処分項の省略)＋ 次元取り違え(第5項を suspense=科目次元にすると『分類済み・未処分』の問いで raised==0 に破綻)。複式(処分次元 I1 / 科目次元 I2)へ訂正。走行ゼロ・手戻りゼロで恒等式を紙上で微分して検出。

replace.question_ledger.conservation_law: I1 (disposal dim): raised_total == resolved + open_gap + rejected + merged + in_flight, where in_flight = undisposed count. I2 (account dim): sum of per-account balances == raised_total (every question has exactly one account_id, UNCLASSIFIED included). BOTH hold at every state transition; violation => halt.

question_ledger.suspense_account.name: UNCLASSIFIED
question_ledger.suspense_account.rule: unclassifiable questions may rest here; balance always visible. At RESOLVED: no question may carry disposal=RESOLVED while account=UNCLASSIFIED; unclassified questions exit only via OPEN_GAP | REJECTED | MERGED_INTO (ADJUDICATION_SENSITIVE: 16). Looseness is permitted temporarily, never permanently.

append.note: suspense_balance は UNCLASSIFIED 件数(per_account_balances['UNCLASSIFIED'])の別名として残す。処分次元(in_flight_count)と科目次元(suspense_balance)は別物なので両方要る。

cc_alpha_design_decisions_flagged: account_id default='DEFAULT'(stage1 で RESOLVED を可能にするため。UNCLASSIFIED は分類保留特殊値)。Taka レビュー対象。
stage1 でも account 次元 I2 を持つ(chart/mining は stage2、account_id 次元自体は stage1 から)。
